title: Application for a Right of Permanent Residence Fee Loan - Canada.ca
content:
## Application for a Right of Permanent Residence Fee Loan
Get help to open an application form or to fill one out in the Help Centre .
This application includes the following items:
- Right of Permanent Residence Fee Loan Application  (IMM 5349) (opens in a new tab)
- Use of a Representative (IMM 5476) (opens in a new tab)
- Instruction Guide (IMM 5351)
This form is not for use by applicants outside Canada. Immigrant applicants abroad should contact the Canadian embassy, high commission or consulate processing their application.
Persons applying for the loan must demonstrate both the need for the loan and the ability to repay it.
- Read your instruction guide and download your application forms.
- Complete, sign and date your application forms.
- Mail your fully completed application to the Case Processing Centre in Edmonton, Alberta .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
